'''yokavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:azinic|azinic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-k-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:azinic|azinic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yokavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || yokavithi || yokaviji || yokavishi || yokaviki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || yokavuthu || yokavuju || yokavushu || yokavuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || yokavuthu || yokavuju || yokavushu || yokavuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || yokavufthuf || yokavufjuf || yokavufshuf || yokavufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || yokavethe || yokaveje || yokaveshe || yokaveke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || yokavotho || yokavojo || yokavosho || yokavoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || yokavotho || yokavojo || yokavosho || yokavoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || yokavofthof || yokavofjof || yokavofshof || yokavofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || yokavïfthïf || yokavïfjïf || yokavïfshïf || yokavïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || yokavïfthïf || yokavïfjïf || yokavïfshïf || yokavïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || yokavïfthïf || yokavïfjïf || yokavïfshïf || yokavïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || yokavïfthïf || yokavïfjïf || yokavïfshïf || yokavïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || yokavæthæ || yokavæjæ || yokavæshæ || yokavækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || yokavatha || yokavaja || yokavasha || yokavaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || yokavatha || yokavaja || yokavasha || yokavaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || yokavafthaf || yokavafjaf || yokavafshaf || yokavafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || yokavasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || yokavshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || yokavroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || yokavmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || yokavyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || goyokavnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || goyokavnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || goyokavnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || goyokavnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || yokakavasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || yokakavshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || yokakavroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || yokakavmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || yokakavyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || goyokakavnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || goyokakavnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || goyokakavnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || goyokakavnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || yekævasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || yekævshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || yekævroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || yekævmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || yekævyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || goyekævnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || goyekævnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || goyekævnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || goyekævnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || yokfavasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || yokfavshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || yokfavroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || yokfavmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || yokfavyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || goyokfavnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || goyokfavnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || goyokfavnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || goyokfavnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
